raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "normative assertion equating natural order with moral goodness to guide value alignment",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "\"nature\" is a coherent, definable category that can be reliably distinguished from the non-natural",
    "evil is not instantiated by anything occurring in accordance with nature",
    "moral value can be derived directly from conformity to natural processes or essences"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent only under a teleological or natural-law metaphysics; otherwise risks circularity by defining both \"nature\" and \"evil\" in mutually reinforcing ways",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "shared, stable criteria exist for identifying what counts as \"according to nature\" and independent agreement that such conformity reliably tracks non-evil outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "\"nature\" encompasses phenomena widely regarded as harmful (disease, predation, natural disasters) or the term is deployed to naturalize culturally contingent practices"
}

parsed_json.communicative_function: normative assertion equating natural order with moral goodness to guide value alignment
implicit_claims: "nature" is a coherent, definable category that can be reliably distinguished from the non-natural
evil is not instantiated by anything occurring in accordance with nature
moral value can be derived directly from conformity to natural processes or essences
parsed_json.coherence_assessment: internally consistent only under a teleological or natural-law metaphysics; otherwise risks circularity by defining both "nature" and "evil" in mutually reinforcing ways
parsed_json.conditions_for_usefulness: shared, stable criteria exist for identifying what counts as "according to nature" and independent agreement that such conformity reliably tracks non-evil outcomes
parsed_json.conditions_for_misleading: "nature" encompasses phenomena widely regarded as harmful (disease, predation, natural disasters) or the term is deployed to naturalize culturally contingent practices
